    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    U

    ui - package ui
     
    UIFactory - Class in util
    Factory class that creates pre-styled Swing components consistent with the Mizan dark theme.
    UIFactory() - Constructor for class util.UIFactory
    Utility class — do not instantiate.
    UNINITIALIZED - Enum constant in enum class domain.CycleStatus
    Cycle has been created but not yet started.
    unit - Variable in class util.GaugePanel
    Unit label displayed below the value (e.g., "EGP").
    unlockButton - Variable in class ui.LockScreen
    Button that submits the entered PIN for verification.
    update(double, String) - Method in class util.GaugePanel
    Updates the gauge fill and centre value, then repaints.
    updateCycleStatus(int, CycleStatus) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Updates the status column of a budget cycle row.
    updateCycleStatus(BudgetCycle, CycleStatus) - Method in class control.CycleManager
    Updates the status of a given cycle in the database.
    updateDailyLimit(double) - Method in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Updates the daily limit label text.
    updateExpense(Expense) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Updates the amount and category of an existing expense record.
    util - package util
